sections.paragraph: μαϰροϑυμέω [μαϰρόϑυμος ‘holding off temper’] be patient Mt 18:26, 29; 1 Cor 13:4; 1 Th 5:14; Hb 6:15; Js 5:7, 8; 2 Pt 3:9. μαϰροϑυμεῖ ἐπ’ αὐτοῖς; does (God) show patience in their case? = does (God) delay in resolving matters in their behalf? in ref. to God’s attitude toward those who cause distress Lk 18:7.
